config.script:
parentId = self.view.custom.selectedVersionId
	BlueRidge.Common.Util.log('BtnNewVersion click; parentId=%s' % parentId)
	if not parentId or parentId <= 0:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast('Cannot create version', 'No source version selected.', 'warn', 5)
		return
	result = BlueRidge.Parts.RouteTemplate.createNewVersion(parentId, None)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(result, 'New version', 'Draft created.', 'Create failed')
	if not result or not result.get('Status'):
		return
	newDraftId = result['NewId']
	self.view.custom.draftId = newDraftId
	header = BlueRidge.Parts.RouteTemplate.getHeader(newDraftId) or {}
	steps = BlueRidge.Parts.RouteTemplate.getSteps(newDraftId) or []
	effStr = str(header.get('EffectiveFrom') or '')[:10]
	draft = {'Id': newDraftId, 'Name': header.get('Name', ''), 'EffectiveFrom': effStr, 'steps': [dict(s) for s in steps]}
	self.view.custom.draftEditDraft = dict(draft)
	self.view.custom.draftSelected = {'Id': newDraftId, 'Name': header.get('Name', ''), 'EffectiveFrom': effStr, 'steps': [dict(s) for s in steps]}
	self.view.custom.mode = 'draft'
	self.view.custom.selectedVersionId = newDraftId
	self.view.rootContainer.reloadVersions()
	self.view.rootContainer.broadcastDirty(False)

draft = self.view.custom.draftEditDraft
	result = BlueRidge.Parts.RouteTemplate.saveAll(self.view.custom.draftId, draft.get('Name'), draft.get('EffectiveFrom'), draft.get('steps') or [])
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(result, 'Route saved', 'Route saved.', 'Save failed')
	if not result or not result.get('Status'):
		return
	self.view.custom.draftSelected = {'Id': draft.get('Id'), 'Name': draft.get('Name'), 'EffectiveFrom': draft.get('EffectiveFrom'), 'steps': [dict(s) for s in (draft.get('steps') or [])]}
	self.view.rootContainer.reloadVersions()
	self.view.rootContainer.broadcastDirty(False)

draft = self.view.custom.draftEditDraft
	result = BlueRidge.Parts.RouteTemplate.publishWithSave(self.view.custom.draftId, draft.get('Name'), draft.get('EffectiveFrom'), draft.get('steps') or [])
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(result, 'Publish', 'Route published.', 'Publish failed')
	if not result or not result.get('Status'):
		return
	publishedId = self.view.custom.draftId
	self.view.custom.draftId = 0
	self.view.custom.draftEditDraft = {'Id': 0, 'Name': '', 'EffectiveFrom': '', 'steps': []}
	self.view.custom.draftSelected = {'Id': 0, 'Name': '', 'EffectiveFrom': '', 'steps': []}
	self.view.custom.mode = 'view'
	self.view.rootContainer.reloadVersions()
	self.view.custom.selectedVersionId = publishedId
	self.view.rootContainer.broadcastDirty(False)

system.perspective.openPopup(id='mpp-confirm-destructive', view='BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmDestructive', modal=True, showCloseIcon=False, params={'title': 'Discard Draft?', 'message': 'This deletes the unpublished draft entirely. It cannot be undone.', 'confirmLabel': 'Discard Draft', 'replyMessage': 'routeConfirmDiscard'})

props.text: Read-only. Click New Version to create a draft copy for editing.

config.script:
BlueRidge.Common.Util.log('BtnAddStep click')
	draft = self.view.custom.draftEditDraft or {}
	steps = list(draft.get('steps') or [])
	steps.append({'Id': None, 'SequenceNumber': len(steps) + 1, 'OperationAreaLocationId': None, 'OperationAreaName': '', 'OperationTemplateId': None, 'OperationCode': '', 'OperationName': '', 'OperationVersionNumber': None, 'DataCollectionSummary': '', 'IsRequired': True, 'Description': None})
	newDraft = {'Id': draft.get('Id'), 'Name': draft.get('Name'), 'EffectiveFrom': draft.get('EffectiveFrom'), 'steps': steps}
	self.view.custom.draftEditDraft = newDraft
	self.view.rootContainer.broadcastDirty(True)
